name: Helen Keller International
mission: Guided by our founder’s remarkable legacy, Helen Keller Intl works to improve the lives of people around the world by protecting vision, enhancing nutri...
theoryOfChange: Helen Keller International has a published strategic framework titled "Leading Locally, Fortifying Futures." This strategy outlines their core program areas of nutrition, vision, and health, addressing persistent public health challenges. It details their plan to build agility and advance innovations for cost-effective solutions, prioritizing local voices and delivering proven solutions. The strategy aims to drive transformation in two critical high-impact areas, working towards a vision where every person can live a healthy life filled with potential. Additionally, for their nutrition programs, Helen Keller International utilizes the "Essential Nutrition Actions (ENA) framework," which provides an operational approach for advocacy, planning, training, and delivery of integrated interventions to achieve public health impact.
